mapper.update: UPDATE MAIN_BANNER SET DISPLAY_ORDER = DISPLAY_ORDER +1, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE DISPLAY_ORDER >= #{displayOrder}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MAIN_BANNER( BANNER_ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL, DISPLAY_ORDER, ACTIVE_YN, START_AT, END_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( MAIN_BANNER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{activeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{startAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
